The item that you can revive full hp and skill when you die

her ultimate is the bread and butter of her kit
applies counter poison and give energy to teammates
i think it also allows you to select a card from draw and remove cost or something
that is actually really good. imagine having really good cards in hand and then you can even have more for lower cost.
Counters are so good in the new chapter
My day 1 team is finally revelant
and the girl that gives shield and counter

oooooooh.
I was wondering but Tulu has nothing to offer as per counter tho
Im not sure about it but it should be stacking
Shark dude just got buffed to get 50% of tentacle damage on his gain counter card
Also before this patch it was to get an alternate win con
if the enemy only hit once per round
shark dude still getting buff till now
isnt he like already very stronk
I can get 300 counter on turn 1 now
dude, just one hits bosses these days
his counter generation is still very reliant on partners
so you cna go full on tentacle team
I havent used red except with new character lol
Now we only need 50% hp to active her extra hit
you can choose a free limited in one of the event pages
Also her ult base dmg is increased
i saw... i'll probably take 24, not sure yet. or maybe Daff but I probably wont use her
Daf after her buff is still not that strong
I took 24 for the 2nd dupe passive
i knew I wasnt wrong to 3 star her.
But man i need exp bottles
ult charge at the start of the battle
Also i recently lvl 70ed and 3 duped tulu's wheel
Red is a beast now with Sorel post-buff, Salvador and Thais <:rose1:1234798154000633949>

Unfortunate thais doesnt fit in my primary red team
24 is already a good enough dps for red

why not pick Salvador in the event then I can try to get Thais (thick thighs saves lives)

credit: 232848201500065792

but tulu coming to standard in 6 months

She can play a significant role in any color team.

24 is the true endgame boss lol
bleed and increase the embryo bar
Its been  a while.... with the selector, I'm overwhelmed with choices so I have to pick carefully.
What's the current red team for Sorel?
Yeah. Been lurking in the forums and other channels and it seems this is the common team right now with Thais
as usual, she's still good... that card was an innovative move on devs part.
a card you stack through out the whole stage.
but usually, I'm annoyed with it because I mostly use it at the wrong time. haha
Apparently you can also copy Ramona's discounted card, I think?
you mean, to use Ramona's ult to copy the card?
Copy the card then use Thais to copy the copied card
but the things is you'd have lost your stack so the damage wont be that high anymore. \
I am very pleased with the devs.
Now I can’t play in public anymore 🤣
She's not mother of all for nothing

my blue team is shark boy, murhpy, tu lu and the yellow shield and counter girl

I didnt have that much time to play the game anymore so having to play it without sweep was exhausting.

Basically yellow are generalists, red are high risk high reward, blue is consistent damage build up, purple is burst
most simple way i can describe each faction
there's at least one character for each archetype in each faction
if you face a enemies with single hit attacks focus on boosting tentacle damage
This is the guide channel in this discord. You can find some interesting guides. You should look for Taptap CN's forum too... but tbh only the discord is this active and proactive with guides
small storoy, but with characters affected by somehow lot or less aphrodisiac force from the mainplot.
Worth pulling for the fate wheels ?
i pull for wheels after getting all the characters i wanted from standard
So only the standard wheels, should ignore the limited?

Why would you?
What he is saying is, as a mew player you should go for the characters, but once your account reaches a certain stage you will want to pull for wheels instead.

However...
The limited banner is the limited banner. Go for what you see fit and most of the characters in the limited bamner pair well with their signature wheel.
Hence, you should be trying to pull for it too.

I did leave the game for over 2 months now but I've been able to gather this much for standard pulls which means that once you have the characters you need you might as well just go for their wheels. You could get lucky.
